arts.ttl: “Being a referee is a difficult profession” – Barcelona star reacts to Real Madrid complaints
arts.sum: Ronald Araujo had looked destined to leave Barcelona in January, but instead, he opted to stay – and also sign a new contract. Since then, he has been regular back in the starting line-up, although a reason for that has been Inigo Martinez’s injury. On Tuesday, Araujo was speaking at the Relats Solidaris event, and […] The post “Being a referee is a difficult profession” – Barcelona star reacts to Real Madrid complaints appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Sociedad vs. Real Madrid; Liga F 2024/25
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Olga, Lakrar, Rocío, Antonia S., Angeldahl, Toletti, Athenea, Weir, Linda C., Bruun Olga is back to the starting lineup on LB, with Antonia occupying the other end.

arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Antonio Rudiger Miss for Real Madrid?
arts.sum: The injured Antonio Rüdiger will miss the Madrid derby, Real Madrid's Champions League clash with Manchester City and more.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Leads Real Madrid to Record-Start Across Europe's Top Five Leagues
arts.sum: Real Madrid are the first team in Europe's top five leagues to have four different players score 10 or more goals.

arts.ttl: Official: 4 drop out as Real Madrid announce squad to face Leganés
arts.sum: The squad of players set to be depended upon by Real Madrid to get the better of Leganés on Wednesday has been unveiled online. And it features a number of…

arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have this week been dealt a fresh, and altogether concerning blow on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that David Alaba has picked up…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury news: Carlo Ancelotti says "we are in emergency" ahead of Man City Champions League tie
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti confirms that he currently has just three central-defensive options available to him ahead of the Champions League tie with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid legend Cristiano Ronaldo assures Vinícius ‘deserved to win’ the Ballon d’Or
arts.sum: Real Madrid icon Cristiano Ronaldo has this week spoken out on current Blancos star Vinícius Jr’s recent Ballon d’Or snub. Wide-man Vinícius, of course, saw his ‘Golden Ball’ hopes shattered…

arts.ttl: Roma looking to chop off Real Madrid at the head
arts.sum: Roma are hoping to lure the Real Madrid manager by appealing to his deep connection with the club. As a player, Ancelotti was a key figure for Roma from 1979 to 1987, making 227 appearances, scoring 17 goals, and winning four Coppa Italia titles along with a historic Scudetto .

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal, Real Madrid, more: Way-too-early look at summer transfer window
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has slammed shut, so it's time to look ahead to teams' needs in the summer. Here's what every team will be looking to do.
